hooks.command: ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && pnpm --dir "$ROOT" --silent build && node "$ROOT/dist/cli.js" hook --base main
hooks.commandWindows: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel; pnpm --dir $root --silent build; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; node (Join-Path $root 'dist/cli.js') hook --base main"
